title: Govt HSS Uparbahal Guest Faculties Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
short_info: Govt. Higher Secondary School, Uparbahal (Govt HSS Uparbahal) has released an official notification for the recruitment of Guest Faculties Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 12-06-2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 65 years Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: PG with minimum 50% marks in the respective subject. B.Ed degree and PGDCA will be given weightage.
qualification.details: Guest Faculties: PG with minimum 50% marks in the respective subject (English, Odia, Political science, History, Economics, Odia(optional)). Retired Govt. / Non-Govt. Aided Lecturers below 65 years of age / fresh candidates are eligible.

salary_details.details: Salary: Rs. 400 per class, maximum 50 classes per month.

selection_process: Application submission Weightage for B.Ed degree and PGDCA
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Govt HSS Uparbahal Guest Faculties Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: balangir.odisha.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 12-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Guest Faculties post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Guest Faculties post is 12-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Guest Faculties post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Post Graduate (PG) degree with a minimum of 50% marks in the respective subject. A B.Ed degree and PGDCA will be given weightage.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying is 65 years of age.

faq.question: Q4. How will the candidates be selected for the Guest Faculties post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves application submission and weightage for B.Ed degree and PGDCA.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the Guest Faculties?
faq.answer: The salary is Rs. 400 per class, with a maximum of 50 classes per month.

faq.question: Q6. What are the subjects for which Guest Faculties are being recruited?
faq.answer: Guest Faculties are being recruited for subjects including English, Odia, Political science, History, Economics, and Odia (optional).

faq.question: Q7. Can fresh candidates apply for the Guest Faculties post?
faq.answer: Yes, fresh candidates are eligible to apply along with retired Govt. / Non-Govt. Aided Lecturers below 65 years of age.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the Guest Faculties position?
faq.answer: Applications can be submitted via email to [email protected] or offline by sending the application form to the Principal, Govt. Higher Secondary School, Uparbahal.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 004.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Govt. Higher Secondary School, Uparbahal located?
faq.answer: The school is located in Uparbahal, Balangir, Odisha, with the pincode 767020.
